description_long: This is a compact, two-seater couch upholstered in a light blue, plush fabric with a slightly mottled texture. The backrest is gently curved and continuous, seamlessly integrated with the armrests, which are thick and extend straight from the back to the front. The seat area appears to be a single, wide cushion, also covered in the same blue fabric, with subtle creases and folds suggesting softness. The couch has no visible legs, giving it a grounded, block-like appearance, and the upholstery shows a faint, irregular pattern reminiscent of brushed or faux fur. The overall design is modern and minimal, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A light blue, plush two-seater couch with a curved backrest, integrated armrests, and a seamless, modern design. The upholstery has a soft, mottled texture and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, straight armrest and the continuous, plush upholstery with subtle creases.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, single seat cushion, curved backrest, and integrated armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the left, with the same thick armrest and plush fabric texture.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the gently curved, continuous backrest and the uninterrupted blue upholstery.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, wide seat cushion and a continuous, integrated backrest; no loose or accent pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light blue with a mottled, brushed texture; no visible decorative stitching, tufting, or patterns.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible; the base appears fully upholstered and flush with the ground, giving a block-like appearance.
attribute_armrest_design: Thick, straight armrests integrated with the backrest, fully upholstered in the same fabric, and extending from the back to the front.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and gently curved backrest, fully attached and integrated with the armrests, with no visible divisions or tufting.
